EDA (Zammad Ticket System)

Dylan Benavides

2026-06-08

Libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)
library(tidytext)
library(ggplot2)
library(text)
library(reactable)
library(uwot)
source("FunctionsSQL.R")

Data

raw.sql <- readLines("zammad_db.sql", warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")

Extract tickets

articles.lines <- grep("^INSERT INTO `ticket_articles`", raw.sql, value = TRUE)
article.records <- list()
for(i in seq_along(articles.lines)){
  recs <- extract.records(articles.lines[i])
  parsed <- lapply(recs, parse.record)
  article.records <- c(article.records, parsed)
}
article.records <- article.records[!duplicated(sapply(article.records, `[`, 1))]

Dataframe

articles.df <- tibble(
  id         = sapply(article.records, `[`, 1),
  ticket.id  = sapply(article.records, `[`, 2),
  sender.id  = sapply(article.records, `[`, 4),
  body       = sapply(article.records, `[`, 15),
  created.at = ymd_hms(sapply(article.records, `[`, 21))
)
ticket.example <- articles.df %>%
  filter(ticket.id == 250) %>%
  arrange(created.at)
ticket.example
## # A tibble: 2 × 5
##   id    ticket.id sender.id body                             created.at         
##   <chr> <chr>     <chr>     <chr>                            <dttm>             
## 1 530   250       2         "'Se podría instalar Krona por … 2023-04-17 15:58:40
## 2 545   250       1         "'<div>Buenas días,</div><div><… 2023-04-20 15:21:14

Clean text

articles.df <- articles.df %>%
  mutate(text.clean = body %>%
           str_remove_all("<[^>]+>") %>%
           str_replace_all("\\\\n", " ") %>%
           str_squish() %>%
           tolower())

User-only data

user.df <- articles.df %>% filter(sender.id == "2")

Ticket-level dataset

ticket.text <- user.df %>%
  group_by(ticket.id) %>%
  summarise(
    text = paste(text.clean, collapse = " "),
    messages = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

N-grama features

get_ngrams <- function(text){
  uni <- unnest_tokens(tibble(text=text), ngram, text, token="ngrams", n=1)
  bi  <- unnest_tokens(tibble(text=text), ngram, text, token="ngrams", n=2)
  tri <- unnest_tokens(tibble(text=text), ngram, text, token="ngrams", n=3)
  c(uni$ngram, bi$ngram, tri$ngram)
}

Classifier Setup

iva_env_patterns <- c("module load", "conda", "mamba", "miniconda", "python env", 
                      "virtual environment", "undefined reference", "library not found", 
                      "shared object", "lib64", "libqt", "gcc", "cmake", "path", "export path")

iva_cmd_patterns <- c("sbatch", "srun", "slurm", "bash script", "run job", 
                      "github", "ssh", "cluster", "node", "partition", "ntasks", "gpu")

human_admin_patterns <- c("instalar", "instalación", "install", "software", "permiso", 
                          "permisos", "acceso", "crear cuenta", "cuenta", "espacio", 
                          "disco", "almacenamiento", "actualizar módulo", "agregar módulo", 
                          "nuevo módulo", "aumentar memoria", "más memoria", "incrementar espacio", 
                          "instalar gdb", "gdb", "no está instalado", "solicitar", 
                          "requiero", "podrían instalar", "podrían agregar")

Execute classification

classification_results <- lapply(ticket.text$text, classify_ticket_optimized)
ticket.text$category <- sapply(classification_results, function(x) x$category)
ticket.text$subtype  <- sapply(classification_results, function(x) x$subtype)
print("Distribución por Categoría Principal:")
## [1] "Distribución por Categoría Principal:"
table(ticket.text$category)
## 
## HUMAN   IVA 
##   315   242
print("Distribución por Subtipo Operativo:")
## [1] "Distribución por Subtipo Operativo:"
table(ticket.text$subtype)
## 
##           HUMAN    IVA_COMMANDS IVA_ENVIRONMENT 
##             315             218              24

Metrics

ticket.text %>% count(category)
## # A tibble: 2 × 2
##   category     n
##   <chr>    <int>
## 1 HUMAN      315
## 2 IVA        242
ticket.text %>% count(subtype)
## # A tibble: 3 × 2
##   subtype             n
##   <chr>           <int>
## 1 HUMAN             315
## 2 IVA_COMMANDS      218
## 3 IVA_ENVIRONMENT    24
tickets.time <- articles.df %>%
  arrange(ticket.id, created.at) %>%
  group_by(ticket.id) %>%
  mutate(time.diff = as.numeric(difftime(created.at, lag(created.at), units="mins"))) %>%
  ungroup()

response.time <- tickets.time %>%
  group_by(ticket.id) %>%
  summarise(
    avg.response.time = mean(time.diff, na.rm=TRUE),
    .groups="drop"
  )
final.dataset <- ticket.text %>%
  left_join(response.time, by = "ticket.id") %>% 
  select(ticket.id, text, category, subtype, messages, avg.response.time) %>%
  mutate(message.full = text)

final.dataset <- final.dataset %>% select(-message.full)

reactable(final.dataset,
  searchable = TRUE,
  filterable = TRUE,
  pagination = TRUE,
  defaultPageSize = 20
)
write.csv(final.dataset, "final_tickets_classified.csv", row.names = FALSE)

Graphics

library(tidytext)
library(tidyverse)

data("stop_words") # stop words estándar en inglés

stopwords.es.completo <- tibble(word = c(
  "el", "la", "los", "las", "un", "una", "unos", "unas", "de", "del", "en", "para", 
  "por", "con", "su", "sus", "al", "lo", "como", "que", "es", "son", "se", "no", "si",
  "y", "o", "pero", "este", "esta", "estos", "estas", "mi", "mis", "tu", "te", "me",
  "gracias", "muchas", "hola", "buenos", "días", "tardes", "estimados", "estimado",
  "saludos", "cordiales", "atentamente", "ayuda", "favor", "solicitud", "tiquete",
  "comentario", "adjunto", "enviar", "correo", "asunto", "pueden", "podrían"
))

bigramas.limpios <- final.dataset %>%
  select(ticket.id, text) %>%
  unnest_tokens(bigram, text, token = "ngrams", n = 2) %>%
  separate(bigram, c("word1", "word2"), sep = " ") %>%
  filter(!word1 %in% stopwords.es.completo$word) %>%
  filter(!word2 %in% stopwords.es.completo$word) %>%
  filter(!word1 %in% stop_words$word) %>%
  filter(!word2 %in% stop_words$word) %>%
  filter(!is.na(word1) & !is.na(word2)) %>%
  unite(bigram, word1, word2, sep = " ")

# Extraer exactamente los 100 bigramas más frecuentes
top.100.bigramas <- bigramas.limpios %>%
  count(bigram, sort = TRUE) %>%
  head(100)

plot.bigramas.100 <- ggplot(top.100.bigramas, aes(x = reorder(bigram, n), y = n)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = reorder(bigram, n), yend = 0), color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(color = "#2c3e50", size = 1.2, alpha = 0.9) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  labs(
    title = "Bigram Frequency in Support Tickets",
    subtitle = "Top 100 lexical combinations identified after bilingual filtering",
    x = "Identified Bigram",
    y = "Absolute Frequency"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray30", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6.5, color = "black"), 
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  )

plot.bigramas.100

automation.summary <- final.dataset %>%
  count(category) %>%
  mutate(
    percentage = n / sum(n) * 100
  )

plot.automation.bar <- ggplot(automation.summary, aes(x = "Workload", y = percentage, fill = category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.4, alpha = 0.85, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("HUMAN" = "#95a5a6", "IVA" = "#1abc9c")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) + 
  labs(
    title = "Potential Automation Share of Support Workload",
    subtitle = "Proportion of tickets resolvable by IVA vs. requiring human intervention",
    x = NULL, 
    y = "Percentage (%)",
    fill = "Workload Category"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray30", hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(percentage, 1), "%")), 
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
            color = "white", 
            fontface = "bold", 
            size = 4)

plot.automation.bar

dist.data <- final.dataset %>%
  filter(!is.na(avg.response.time) & avg.response.time > 0) %>%
  mutate(avg.response.hours = avg.response.time / 60)

stats.data <- dist.data %>%
  summarise(
    min.val = min(avg.response.hours),
    med.val = median(avg.response.hours),
    mean.val = mean(avg.response.hours),
    p95 = quantile(avg.response.hours, 0.95)
  )

plot.avg.time <- ggplot(dist.data, aes(x = "General Queue", y = avg.response.hours)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "#f0f2f5", color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7, trim = FALSE, width = 0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "#3498db", color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  annotate("text", x = 1.15, y = stats.data$min.val, label = paste("Min:", round(stats.data$min.val, 2)), size = 3, hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.15, y = stats.data$med.val, label = paste("Mediana:", round(stats.data$med.val, 2)), size = 3, hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.15, y = stats.data$mean.val, label = paste("Media:", round(stats.data$mean.val, 2)), size = 3, hjust = 0, color = "darkred") +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, stats.data$p95 * 1.1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Average Response Time", 
    y = "Avg Response Time (Hours)", 
    x = NULL
  )

plot.avg.time
